_source: FAO Irrigation and Drainage Paper No. 56, Chapter 8 (Allen et al. 1998)
_note: Daily soil water balance for irrigation scheduling

_provenance.method: hand-digitized from FAO-56 Chapter 8 equations and USDA soil data
_provenance.reproduction_note: Re-run baseline_command at baseline_commit to regenerate expected values
_provenance._tolerance_justification: Mass balance tolerance of 1e-10 mm verifies conservation law; per-step tolerance accommodates IEEE-754 f64 rounding in sequential accumulation.

fao56_equations.water_balance: Dr_i = Dr_{i-1} - (P_i - RO_i) - I_i - CR_i + ETc_adj_i + DP_i
fao56_equations.stress_coefficient: Ks = (TAW - Dr) / (TAW - RAW)  when Dr > RAW, else 1.0

stress_coefficient._description: Silt loam for Ks analytical checks (FAO-56 Eq. 84, Table 19)

mass_balance._description: Generic loam for dry-down and irrigated mass balance tests

michigan_summer._description: Silt loam for Michigan summer scenario (June-August corn)

mass_balance_test._description: Verify P + I + CR = ETc + DP + delta_S (inflow = outflow + storage)

real_data_scenarios._source: Dong et al. (2024) field configurations + FAO-56 Table 22 defaults
